nasb.text: And Abraham replied, “Now behold, I have ventured to speak to the Lord, although I am but dust and ashes.

esv.text: Abraham answered and said, “Behold, I have undertaken to speak to the Lord, I who am but dust and ashes.

cnv.text: 亞伯拉罕回答，說：“我雖然是灰塵，還大膽地對我主說話。

ccb.text: 亚伯拉罕说：“主啊，虽然我渺小如灰尘，但我还要大胆地求问你，

csbs.text: 亚伯拉罕回应说：“看哪，尽管我是尘土和灰烬，也容我斗胆向我主说，
